creator: chinsan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: chinsan->skv

This PR's original Synopsis was: 
databases/p5-DBI - Class::DBI-inserting multiple records in posgresql schema faild 

In fact, it should be databases/p5-DBI-Class, therefore I modified as: 
databases/p5-DBI-Class: Class::DBI-inserting multiple records in posgresql schema faild 

Also, return this back to maintainer(skv@).
